info.name: CycleX - Full API Test Collection
info.description:
Complete API test collection for CycleX-BE project.

Covers all modules:
- Auth (Login, Register, OTP)
- Users CRUD
- BikeListings CRUD
- Seller Module (S-10 to S-18, Listing Result with InspectionReport)
- Inspector Module (S-20 to S-24, Approve/Reject with reason, InspectionReport, Disputes)
- Inspection Chat (S-40)
- Inspection Response (S-42)
- Purchase Request (S-50)
- Seller Transactions (S-52/S-53)
- Buyer Transactions (S-54)
- Shipper Dashboard (S-60)

Base URL: http://localhost:4491

item.name: 🔐 1. Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints: Register, Login, OTP verification

Get listing info + inspection report (lý do approve/reject).
Response: { listing: SellerListingResponse, inspectionReport: InspectionReportResponse }

item.name: 🚚 11. Shipper Dashboard (S-60)
item.description: Shipper dashboard summary and assigned deliveries

item.name: 🔥 12. Full Flow Tests
item.description: End-to-end test scenarios that follow the complete business flow

item.name: Flow 1: Seller Create → Inspector Approve → Buyer Purchase
item.description:
Complete happy path flow:
1. Seller registers & logs in
2. Seller creates listing
3. Seller submits draft
4. Inspector locks listing
5. Inspector approves → Product created
6. Buyer creates purchase request
7. Seller confirms transaction

item.name: Flow 2: Seller Create → Inspector Reject
item.description:
Rejection flow:
1. Seller creates listing
2. Inspector locks
3. Inspector rejects with reason

item.name: Flow 3: Buyer Cancel Transaction
item.description:
Cancellation flow:
1. Buyer creates purchase request
2. Buyer cancels before seller confirms
